# PR Type (Conventional Commits)

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests (test)

## Context

- Why was this change necessary?

## What changed

- Short, objective list of main changes

## Frontend Checklist (Yes / Not needed)

- Responsiveness tested
  - [ ] Yes
  - [ ] Not needed
- Accessibility reviewed
  - [ ] Yes
  - [ ] Not needed
- Automated tests cover happy, bad, and edge cases
  - [ ] Yes
  - [ ] Not needed
- Storybook updated/created
  - [ ] Yes
  - [ ] Not needed
- Performance assured
  - [ ] Yes
  - [ ] Not needed
